payload.name: i already restart kimchi and were ready for ferment do all
payload.description: i already restart kimchi and were ready for ferment do all

goal.answer: Build Floor 1 Basement as the first playable greybox level with Phase 1 note-collection and word-registration mechanics. The deliverable is an end-to-end playable core loop: player spawns on F1_Basement → walks through greybox corridors → finds a note → picks it up (E hold 2s) → speaks the word aloud (Tier 1+) → RegistrationBoard detects speech within radius → WordRegistry registers the word → HUD updates with Phase 1 progress → ListenerAI reacts to the speech via HearNoise and transitions from Idle patrol toward the player. This validates VoiceManager + ListenerAI + PlayerController + GameManager + NetworkManager together on real geometry for the first time.

payload.plain: Build Floor 1 Basement as the first playable greybox level with Phase 1 note-collection and word-registration mechanics. The deliverable is an end-to-end playable core loop: player spawns on F1_Basement → walks through greybox corridors → finds a note → picks it up (E hold 2s) → speaks the word aloud (Tier 1+) → RegistrationBoard detects speech within radius → WordRegistry registers the word → HUD updates with Phase 1 progress → ListenerAI reacts to the speech via HearNoise and transitions from Idle patrol toward the player. This validates VoiceManager + ListenerAI + PlayerController + GameManager + NetworkManager together on real geometry for the first time.

criteria.answer:
Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn exists with greybox wall (BoxMesh), floor (PlaneMesh), ceiling, staircase, NavigationRegion3D child with geometry under it, 4 Marker3D NoteSpawn positions, 1 Marker3D ListenerSpawn, and 1 Area3D RegistrationBoardArea. Godot's NavMesh bakes successfully at runtime via GameManager.SetupNavigationRuntime on F1_Basement geometry.
Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs exists with [Export] string AssignedWord, [Export] int Tier, [Export] MeshInstance3D mesh, [Export] Area3D interaction trigger, public PickUp(PlayerController) method, and NotePickedUp signal.
Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs exists with [Export] float DetectionRadius, Area3D detection trigger, and WordRegistrationRequested signal that fires when player speaks Tier 1+ within range.
Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs exists with RegisterWord(string word, long peerId) method (idempotent — registering same word twice is a no-op), RegisteredWord(word, peerName) signal, and AllWordsRegistered signal that fires when 4/4 words are registered.
GameManager spawns 4 NoteItem instances on run start using WordPool.DrawDistinct(4, rng) and instantiates them at the F1_Basement NoteSpawn marker positions, with each note assigned a distinct Tier-1 word.
HUDManager shows PhaseTracker (top-left 3 dots — Phase 1 active, dots fill on registration) and WordRegistry overlay (visible list of registered words). Both update on RegisteredWord signal.
Full signal chain wired: VoiceManager.TierChanged → RegistrationBoard.OnTierChanged (checks radius + held note) → WordRegistry.RegisterWord → HUDManager.OnRegisteredWord → PhaseTracker advances. ListenerAI.HearNoise fires when player speaks within RegistrationBoard detection radius.
Godot --headless --quit smoke test passes: the project parses and compiles without fatal errors when loading F1_Basement.tscn. No parse errors in .tscn, no compile errors in .cs, no fatal runtime errors during scene load.

plain: Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn exists with greybox wall (BoxMesh), floor (PlaneMesh), ceiling, staircase, NavigationRegion3D child with geometry under it, 4 Marker3D NoteSpawn positions, 1 Marker3D ListenerSpawn, and 1 Area3D RegistrationBoardArea. Godot's NavMesh bakes successfully at runtime via GameManager.SetupNavigationRuntime on F1_Basement geometry.

Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs exists with [Export] string AssignedWord, [Export] int Tier, [Export] MeshInstance3D mesh, [Export] Area3D interaction trigger, public PickUp(PlayerController) method, and NotePickedUp signal.
Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs exists with [Export] float DetectionRadius, Area3D detection trigger, and WordRegistrationRequested signal that fires when player speaks Tier 1+ within range.

Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs exists with RegisterWord(string word, long peerId) method (idempotent — registering same word twice is a no-op), RegisteredWord(word, peerName) signal, and AllWordsRegistered signal that fires when 4/4 words are registered.

GameManager spawns 4 NoteItem instances on run start using WordPool.DrawDistinct(4, rng) and instantiates them at the F1_Basement NoteSpawn marker positions, with each note assigned a distinct Tier-1 word.
HUDManager shows PhaseTracker (top-left 3 dots — Phase 1 active, dots fill on registration) and WordRegistry overlay (visible list of registered words). Both update on RegisteredWord signal.

Full signal chain wired: VoiceManager.TierChanged → RegistrationBoard.OnTierChanged (checks radius + held note) → WordRegistry.RegisterWord → HUDManager.OnRegisteredWord → PhaseTracker advances. ListenerAI.HearNoise fires when player speaks within RegistrationBoard detection radius.

Godot --headless --quit smoke test passes: the project parses and compiles without fatal errors when loading F1_Basement.tscn. No parse errors in .tscn, no compile errors in .cs, no fatal runtime errors during scene load.

constraints.answer: No external 3D model downloads during this ferment — greybox primitives only., No new Godot plugins or GDExtensions., No Steam integration (deferred per user instruction)., Phase 2 (sequence) and Phase 3 (Final Broadcast) game mechanics are explicitly out of scope for this ferment., MVP roles (Mute, Loud, Static) are not implemented — this ferment runs with the no-role baseline only., No multiplayer networking for note spawning or word registration — single-player/offline only., Visual polish (textures, lighting, audio cues) deferred to a polish ferment.

plain: No external 3D model downloads during this ferment — greybox primitives only.
No new Godot plugins or GDExtensions.
No Steam integration (deferred per user instruction).
Phase 2 (sequence) and Phase 3 (Final Broadcast) game mechanics are explicitly out of scope for this ferment.
MVP roles (Mute, Loud, Static) are not implemented — this ferment runs with the no-role baseline only.
No multiplayer networking for note spawning or word registration — single-player/offline only.
Visual polish (textures, lighting, audio cues) deferred to a polish ferment.

phases.answer: Floor 1 Layout, Note System Items, Integration & Smoke Test

phaseSnapshots.name: Floor 1 Layout
phaseSnapshots.goal: Create F1_Basement.tscn with greybox static geometry, NavigationRegion3D, spawn markers, and RegistrationBoard area.

steps.description: Create Scenes/Floors/ directory. Author F1_Basement.tscn: StaticBody3D walls as BoxMesh children arranged in a U-shaped basement (two long walls + back wall + central pillar). PlaneMesh floor, BoxMesh ceiling. Staircase as 5 BoxMesh steps leading up. Breakable Windows as BoxMesh rectangles on the back wall.

Add NavigationRegion3D under the scene root with all geometry as children. Add Node3D 'SpawnPoints' container with 4 Marker3D children at distinct positions (one in each room corner + one near back wall). Add Marker3D 'ListenerSpawn' near the staircase. Add Area3D 'RegistrationBoardArea' with SphereShape3D radius 3.0m positioned centrally near the staircase.

verification.command: grep -q 'NavigationRegion3D' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn && grep -q 'SpawnPoints' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn && grep -q 'ListenerSpawn' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn && grep -q 'RegistrationBoardArea' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn

steps.description: Update GameManager._Ready to instance F1_Basement.tscn when GameScene loads, parent its geometry under the existing NavigationRegion3D, and bake the NavMesh via SetupNavigationRuntime. Add a 'LevelManager' or extend GameManager with F1_Basement loading logic.

phaseSnapshots.name: Note System Items
phaseSnapshots.goal: Implement NoteItem, RegistrationBoard, and WordRegistry classes with all signals.

steps.description: Author Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs: inherits Node3D. [Export] string AssignedWord, [Export] int Tier, [Export] MeshInstance3D NoteMesh, [Export] Area3D InteractionTrigger. On _Ready, creates the visible note mesh (CSGBox3D with parchment-yellow color). On InteractionTrigger.body_entered + E held 2s + player silent (tier == Tier 0), assigns note to player.Inventory and emits NotePickedUp signal.

verification.command: grep -q 'class NoteItem' Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs && grep -q 'AssignedWord' Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs && grep -q 'PickUp' Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs && grep -q 'NotePickedUp' Scripts/World/NoteItem.cs

steps.description: Author Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs: inherits Area3D. [Export] float DetectionRadius. Connects to VoiceManager.TierChanged on _Ready. On tier >= 1, checks if player is within DetectionRadius AND player has held note. If both true, emits WordRegistrationRequested(word, playerName, peerId).

verification.command: grep -q 'class RegistrationBoard' Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs && grep -q 'DetectionRadius' Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs && grep -q 'WordRegistrationRequested' Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs && grep -q 'TierChanged' Scripts/World/RegistrationBoard.cs

steps.description: Author Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs: plain C# static class. Maintains List<string> RegisteredWords, HashSet<string> RegisteredSet (idempotency). Method RegisterWord(string word, long peerId) adds if not in RegisteredSet, emits RegisteredWord signal. Tracks total registered count. Emits AllWordsRegistered when count reaches 4.

verification.command: grep -q 'class WordRegistry' Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs && grep -q 'RegisterWord' Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs && grep -q 'RegisteredWord' Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs && grep -q 'AllWordsRegistered' Scripts/World/WordRegistry.cs

steps.description: Update GameManager.SpawnNoteItems(): reads SpawnPoints from F1_Basement, shuffles the 4 positions with a seeded Random, calls WordPool.DrawDistinct(4, rng) to get 4 distinct Tier-1 words, instantiates 4 NoteItem scenes at each position with assigned word and tier. Connection wiring: RegistrationBoard.WordRegistrationRequested → WordRegistry.RegisterWord.

verification.command: grep -q 'SpawnNoteItems' Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs && grep -q 'DrawDistinct' Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs && grep -q 'RegisterWord' Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs

phaseSnapshots.name: Integration & Smoke Test
phaseSnapshots.goal: Wire HUD updates and verify the full loop runs without errors via Godot --headless smoke test.

steps.description: Update Scripts/UI/HUDManager.cs: add [Export] NodePath PhaseTrackerPath and NodePath WordRegistryPath. Connect WordRegistry.RegisteredWord and WordRegistry.AllWordsRegistered signals. On each registration, append word to WordRegistry UI list and fill the corresponding PhaseTracker dot. Reuse TokenTransferred signal handler as reference pattern for signal-driven UI updates.

verification.command: grep -q 'PhaseTracker' Scripts/UI/HUDManager.cs && grep -q 'RegisteredWord' Scripts/UI/HUDManager.cs && grep -q 'WordRegistry' Scripts/UI/HUDManager.cs && grep -q 'AllWordsRegistered' Scripts/UI/HUDManager.cs

steps.description: Confirm ListenerAI reaction: ListenerAI.HearNoise signal is emitted when VoiceManager.TierChanged fires within Listener's hearing range. Add a connection in GameManager._Ready: VoiceManager.TierChanged → ListenerAI.HearNoise (or ListenerBTSetTargetMode) so the Listener patrols toward the speech source when player registers a word at the board.

verification.command: grep -q 'HearNoise' Scripts/Enemy/ListenerAI.cs && grep -q 'TierChanged' Scripts/Enemy/ListenerAI.cs && grep -q 'ListenerAI' Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs

steps.description: Run Godot --headless --quit smoke test against the project. Expected exit 0 with no parse errors in F1_Basement.tscn, no compile errors in any .cs file, and no fatal runtime errors during scene load. Use the known Godot binary path: /mnt/c/Users/LENOVO/Desktop/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_win64/Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_win64.exe.

assumptions.answer: WordPool.cs and MonologuePool.cs (created in prior session) are usable as-is — no changes needed.; ListenerAI.cs is already implemented and tested as the hunting AI — this ferment only adds signal wiring (VoiceManager.TierChanged → ListenerAI.HearNoise), no new AI states.; PlayerController.cs and VoiceManager.cs remain unchanged except for minimal signal exposure (TierChanged signal is already public; no new exports needed).; NetworkManager.cs is not modified — single-player / offline mode only for this ferment. Multiplayer note sync deferred.; Godot 4.6.2 binary path is known and accessible: C:\Users\LENOVO\Desktop\Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_win64\Godot_v4.6.2-stable_mono_win64.exe. Verified present at start of session.; godot-mcp is installed via `kimchi install npm:@coding-solo/godot-mcp` and the plugin is enabled. After Kimchi restart, MCP tools (create_scene, add_node, run_project, get_debug_output, save_scene, get_uid, etc.) are accessible via the MCP gateway.; All F1_Basement geometry uses Godot primitive meshes (BoxMesh, PlaneMesh, SphereShape3D) — no external asset downloads.; NavMesh baking at runtime works — Godot's NavigationRegion3D supports runtime baking via bake_navigation_mesh() or NavigationServer3D baking when geometry is reparented under it.; Testing infrastructure (NUnit, headless test scenes) is deferred to a follow-up ferment — this ferment relies on Godot --headless --quit smoke test only.
